notes: v1.14.95 - Two redesign fixes. FIX A: #pg-cmd bottom reserve 24px -> calc(96px + safe-bottom) so OPS SIGNAL clears the fixed bottom nav. FIX B: search re-homed to Ref - the top search bar now shows ONLY on Ref in redesign (mock-clean Command/Work headers). showMode toggles body.mode-ref + clears the field/overlay when leaving Ref; CSS body.rd .search-wrap{display:none} + body.rd.mode-ref .search-wrap{display:flex}. Plus a handoff-gap fix: hideSearch's page-restore relied on an active .tn-item, which never exists in redesign (showMode passes null) - so clearing search on Ref would blank the view; hideSearch now re-activates the current redesign mode page from the active bottom-nav item (redesign-gated, legacy untouched). Field app (?redesign=0) unchanged.
